remarks: LOOKING FOR AN OPEN FLOOR PLAN, COMMUTER FRIENDLY LOCATION AND WATER VIEWS... Welcome to Riverwalk, located at 4 Daskams Ln in Norwalk, CT. A short walk to Metro North, the Wall Street District, shopping and dining, as well as a short drive to I95, Rt 7 Connector, Merritt Parkway, SONO, Calf Pasture Beach, Stew Leonard's, Whole Foods and much, much more!!! This 2 bedroom, 2 full bath unit offers a large living room with vaulted ceiling, gas fireplace and French doors leading to an oversized deck with river views. The open concept dining area and galley kitchen with breakfast bar, makes entertaining a breeze. Extra large master bedroom suite with full bath and walk-in closet. Second bedroom, full bath, large storage closet and laundry room complete this unit. Elevator Building with community room and covered parking garage for tenants use only. Deeded parking space and extra unassigned spaces in garage and exterior lot. Don't miss this wonderful opportunity. Schedule your appointment today!
